content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Validate AI Ideas (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop guessing if your AI app works. Learn how to implement high-conversion user onboarding to validate your ideas using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The root cause of idea failure is lack of user intent data. By implementing an onboarding flow that forces users to define their core problem immediately, you capture actionable feedback. Use Antigravity for UI scaffolding and Claude Code for rapid logic implementation to validate your MVP in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks writing code, perfecting your prompt engineering, and agonizing over the UI, only to launch to a ghost town. The silence isn't a technical failure; it’s a validation failure. You built for a ghost, not a user. The gap between a hobby project and a viable SaaS is the ability to prove your solution solves a burning pain point the moment a user hits your landing page.

Great onboarding is not just a tutorial; it is a diagnostic tool. By guiding your user through a structured discovery phase, you collect the qualitative data necessary to pivot or persist. We will transform your app from a static tool into an interactive validation engine, ensuring every sign-up provides a data point for your future roadmap.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Map out the 3-step sequence where a user identifies their persona, their primary pain point, and their desired outcome before they see your dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-conversion 3-step onboarding flow component in React/Tailwind that captures user persona and pain point data before showing the main app dashboard.

steps.title: Implement Intent-Driven Data Capture
steps.description: Store the onboarding data in your backend to segment users. This allows you to track which features are used by which personas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Supabase schema and API endpoint to store user onboarding responses, including persona and pain_point fields.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add-feature --task 'create user_profiles table in supabase and link to auth.users'

steps.title: Build the 'Aha!' Moment Trigger
steps.description: Use the onboarding data to dynamically adjust the UI. If a user says they struggle with 'writing', show the AI writing assistant immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a conditional dashboard logic that renders specific widgets based on the 'pain_point' data retrieved from the user_profiles table.

steps.title: Integrate Feedback Loops
steps.description: Add a micro-survey at the end of the first successful task completion to validate if the AI output actually solved the user's initial pain point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a lightweight 'Was this helpful?' feedback modal that triggers after the first AI generation call.

steps.title: Analyze and Pivot
steps.description: Use Claude Code to aggregate your onboarding data and generate a summary report of user pain points to identify your product-market fit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script to aggregate user_profiles data and output a summary of the most common user pain points.

pro_tips: Never ask for an email until after the user has experienced their first 'Aha!' moment in the onboarding flow.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure' to hide complex features, revealing them only as the user demonstrates intent during onboarding.
Tag users by their onboarding choices in your analytics tool to see which segment is most likely to convert to paid users.
Keep your onboarding under 60 seconds; if it takes longer, you are building a survey, not a product.
Use the onboarding data to auto-populate the user's initial prompt, reducing the blank-page friction for your AI.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding is live, spend 48 hours observing your user session recordings. If users drop off at a specific question, rewrite it. If they reach the end but don't convert, your core AI value proposition needs adjustment.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop guessing and start building with purpose. Stop building in the dark and start gathering the data you need to ship a product people actually want. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
